nasb.text: At this time Peter stood up in the midst of the brethren (a gathering of about one hundred and twenty persons was there together), and said,

esv.text: In those days Peter stood up among the brothers (the company of persons was in all about 120) and said,

cnv.text: 那時，約有一百二十人聚會，彼得在眾弟兄中間站起來說：

ccb.text: 那时，约有一百二十人在聚会，彼得站起来说：

csbs.text: 就在那些日子里，聚在一起的人约有一百二十名。彼得在弟兄中间站起来，说：
